message:
test(oracle): add 20 conformance tests s83a-s83t (multi-table JOIN + planner reshaping probes)

Five-table schema (regions/stores/products/sales/returns) exercising
PLANNER-3 join-order reshaping: 5-table INNER JOIN (s83a), LEFT JOIN
with returns (s83b), aggregate by region (s83c), HAVING filter (s83d),
subquery in WHERE (s83e), net sales minus returns (s83f), window SUM
over JOIN (s83g), CROSS JOIN filtered (s83h), self-join comparison
(s83i), UNION ALL join (s83l), derived table join (s83m), CASE in
aggregate join (s83n), multi-aggregate GROUP BY expr (s83o), LEFT JOIN
NULL aggregate (s83p), INSERT from 4-table join aggregate (s83s),
window RANK over join (s83t). 16 pass, 4 ignored:
- s83j: correlated EXISTS with multi-table JOIN subquery
- s83k: IN subquery in JOIN ON clause (not implemented)
- s83q: DELETE WHERE IN (multi-table subquery)
- s83r: UPDATE WHERE IN (multi-table subquery)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
